title: lastreopsis chontalensis
intro: Lastreopsis chontalensis is a species of fern native to Mexico, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Lastreopsis chontalensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Lastreopsis chontalensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or decocting them in a solvent to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
